.entry-content .wp-block-column .alignwide{width: 100%;margin-left: auto;margin-right: auto;}.wp-block-gallery,.blocks-gallery-grid {margin: 0;}.wp-block-separator {max-width: 100px;}.wp-block-separator.is-style-wide,.wp-block-separator.is-style-dots {max-width: none;}.entry-content .has-2-columns .wp-block-column:first-child {padding-right: 10px;}.entry-content .has-2-columns .wp-block-column:last-child {padding-left: 10px;}@media (max-width: 782px) {.entry-content .wp-block-columns .wp-block-column {flex-basis: 100%;}.entry-content .has-2-columns {margin-left: auto;margin-right: auto;}.entry-content .blocks-gallery-item img {margin-bottom: auto;}.wp-block-pullquote {border-top: 4px solid #555d66;border-bottom: 4px solid #555d66;color: .member-content,.bp-block-members.columns-3 .member-content,.bp-block-members.columns-4 .member-content{display:block;text-align:center}.bp-block-members.columns-2 .member-content img.avatar{height:auto;max-width:-moz-fit-content;max-width:fit-content;width:auto}.bp-block-members .member-content.has-activity{align-items:center}.bp-block-members .member-content.has-activity </style>

/*!***************************************************************************************************************************************************************************************************************************************!*\
!*** css ./node_modules/css-loader/dist/cjs.js??ruleSet[1].rules[4].use[1]!./node_modules/postcss-loader/dist/cjs.js??ruleSet[1].rules[4].use[2]!./node_modules/sass-loader/dist/cjs.js??ruleSet[1].rules[4].use[3]!./src/style.scss ***!

box-shadow: inset 0 0 0 1px #1e1e1e;
box-sizing: border-box;
color: #1e1e1e;
margin: 0;
min-height: 200px;
outline: 1px solid transparent;
padding: 0;
position: relative;
text-align: left;
width: 100%;
}

width: 100%;
height: 500px;
border-style: none;
}

!important;}.has-white-color{color: var(--wp--preset--color--white) !important;}.has-pale-pink-color{color: var(--wp--preset--color--pale-pink) !important;}.has-vivid-red-color{color: var(--wp--preset--color--vivid-red) !important;}.has-luminous-vivid-orange-color{color: var(--wp--preset--color--luminous-vivid-orange) !important;}.has-luminous-vivid-amber-color{color: li.product:nth-child(n){margin-right:20px;clear:none;}.woocommerce.tablet-columns-2 ul.products li.product:nth-child(2n), .woocommerce-page.tablet-columns-2 ul.products li.product:nth-child(2n), .woocommerce.tablet-columns-3 ul.products li.product:nth-child(3n), .woocommerce-page.tablet-columns-3 ul.products li.product:nth-child(3n), .woocommerce.tablet-columns-4 ul.products li.product:nth-child(4n), .woocommerce-page.tablet-columns-4 ul.products li.product:nth-child(4n), .woocommerce.tablet-columns-5 ul.products li.product:nth-child(5n), li.product:nth-child(6n){margin-right:0;clear:right;}.woocommerce.tablet-columns-2 ul.products li.product:nth-child(2n+1), .woocommerce-page.tablet-columns-2 ul.products li.product:nth-child(2n+1), }

class="post-1256 page type-page status-publish user-has-earned ast-article-single" id="post-1256" itemtype="https://schema.org/CreativeWork" itemscope="itemscope">

itemprop="text">
<div id="pl-1256"  class="panel-layout" ><div id="pg-1256-0"  class="panel-grid panel-has-style" ><div class="siteorigin-panels-stretch panel-row-style panel-row-style-for-1256-0" data-stretch-type="full-stretched" ><div id="pgc-1256-0-0"  class="panel-grid-cell" ><div id="panel-1256-0-0-0" class="so-panel widget widget_sow-hero panel-first-child panel-last-child" data-index="0" ><div
class="so-widget-sow-hero so-widget-sow-hero-default-0594a396fb22-1256"
>				<div class="sow-slider-base" style="display: none" tabindex="0">
<ul
class="sow-slider-images"
data-settings="{&quot;pagination&quot;:true,&quot;speed&quot;:800,&quot;timeout&quot;:8000,&quot;paused&quot;:true,&quot;pause_on_hover&quot;:false,&quot;swipe&quot;:false,&quot;nav_always_show_desktop&quot;:&quot;&quot;,&quot;nav_always_show_mobile&quot;:&quot;&quot;,&quot;breakpoint&quot;:&quot;780px&quot;,&quot;unmute&quot;:false,&quot;anchor&quot;:null}"
data-anchor-id=""
>		<li class="sow-slider-image  sow-slider-image-cover" style="visibility: visible;;background-color: #333333;background-image: url(https://www.motodeks.com/wp-content/uploads/2021/05/Motodeks-Ana-Sayfa-Görsel.png)" >

</div></div></div></div></div></div><div id="pg-1256-1"  class="panel-grid panel-has-style" ><div class="panel-row-style panel-row-style-for-1256-1" ><div id="pgc-1256-1-0"  class="panel-grid-cell" ><div id="panel-1256-1-0-0" class="so-panel widget widget_sow-headline panel-first-child panel-last-child" data-index="1" ><div
class="so-widget-sow-headline so-widget-sow-headline-default-fdf7ca7ad8eb-1256"
><div class="sow-headline-container ">
<h1 class="sow-headline">
Motodeks'ine kavuşmaya hazır mısın?						</h1>
<div class="decoration">
<div class="decoration-inside"></div>
</div>
<h3 class="sow-sub-headline">
Motosiklet Kimliğini Oluştur. Paylaş, Kazan!						</h3>
</div>
</div></div></div></div></div><div id="pg-1256-2"  class="panel-grid panel-no-style" ><div id="pgc-1256-2-0"  class="panel-grid-cell" ><div id="panel-1256-2-0-0" class="so-panel widget widget_sow-features panel-first-child panel-last-child" data-index="2" ><div class="panel-widget-style panel-widget-style-for-1256-2-0-0" ><div
class="so-widget-sow-features so-widget-sow-features-default-61ae9a0193c5-1256"
>
<div class="sow-features-list sow-features-responsive">
<div
class="sow-features-feature sow-icon-container-position-top"
style="display: flex; flex-direction: column; width: calc(100% - 25px);"
>
<a
href="https://www.motodeks.com/go"
>
<div
class="sow-icon-container sow-container-round"
style="color: #ffffff; "
>
<span class="sow-icon-elegantline" data-sow-icon="&#xe000;"
style="font-size: 48px; color: #000000" 
aria-hidden="true"></span>				</div>
</a>
<div class="textwidget">
<h5>
<a
href="https://www.motodeks.com/go"
>
Patron Ol															</a>
</h5>
<p>Motosiklet kanalını aç, tecrübe ve maceralarını herkes ile paylaş. Kendi işini yapmak için ilk adımı şimdi at!</p>
</div>
</div>
<div
class="sow-features-feature sow-icon-container-position-top"
style="display: flex; flex-direction: column; width: calc(100% - 25px);"
>
<a
href="https://www.motodeks.com/motodeks"
>
<div
class="sow-icon-container sow-container-round"
style="color: #ffffff; "
>
<span class="sow-icon-elegantline" data-sow-icon="&#xe029;"
style="font-size: 48px; color: #000000" 
aria-hidden="true"></span>				</div>
</a>
<div class="textwidget">
<h5>
<a
href="https://www.motodeks.com/motodeks"
>
Keşfe Çık															</a>
</h5>
<p>+3700'den fazla motosiklet modeline ait bilgilere kolayca ulaş. Yeni nesil sosyal platformun tadını çıkar!</p>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div></div></div></div><div id="pgc-1256-2-1"  class="panel-grid-cell" ><div id="panel-1256-2-1-0" class="so-panel widget widget_sow-image panel-first-child panel-last-child" data-index="3" ><div
class="so-widget-sow-image so-widget-sow-image-default-c67d20f9f743-1256"
>
<div class="sow-image-container">
<img fetchpriority="high" decoding="async" src="https://www.motodeks.com/wp-content/uploads/2021/05/Motodeks-İphone-1-1.png" width="282" height="527" srcset="https://www.motodeks.com/wp-content/uploads/2021/05/Motodeks-İphone-1-1.png 282w, https://www.motodeks.com/wp-content/uploads/2021/05/Motodeks-İphone-1-1-161x300.png 161w, https://www.motodeks.com/wp-content/uploads/2021/05/Motodeks-İphone-1-1-80x150.png 80w, https://www.motodeks.com/wp-content/uploads/2021/05/Motodeks-İphone-1-1-257x480.png 257w, https://www.motodeks.com/wp-content/uploads/2021/05/Motodeks-İphone-1-1-27x50.png 27w, https://www.motodeks.com/wp-content/uploads/2021/05/Motodeks-İphone-1-1-54x100.png 54w" sizes="(max-width: 282px) 100vw, 282px" title="Motodeks İphone" alt="Motodeks İphone 1 1" class="so-widget-image">
</div>
</div></div></div><div id="pgc-1256-2-2"  class="panel-grid-cell" ><div id="panel-1256-2-2-0" class="so-panel widget widget_sow-features panel-first-child panel-last-child" data-index="4" ><div class="panel-widget-style panel-widget-style-for-1256-2-2-0" ><div
class="so-widget-sow-features so-widget-sow-features-default-61ae9a0193c5-1256"
>
<div class="sow-features-list sow-features-responsive">
<div
class="sow-features-feature sow-icon-container-position-top"
style="display: flex; flex-direction: column; width: calc(100% - 25px);"
>
<a
href="https://www.motodeks.com/vitrin"
>
<div
class="sow-icon-container sow-container-round"
style="color: #ffffff; "
>
<span class="sow-icon-elegantline" data-sow-icon="&#xe016;"
style="font-size: 48px; color: #000000" 
aria-hidden="true"></span>				</div>
</a>
<div class="textwidget">
<h5>
<a
href="https://www.motodeks.com/vitrin"
>
Paylaştıkça Kazan															</a>
</h5>
<p>+1500 çeşit motosiklet kategorisi arasından ücretsiz ilan ver. Kazanç elde etmeye hemen başla!</p>
</div>
</div>
<div
class="sow-features-feature sow-icon-container-position-top"
style="display: flex; flex-direction: column; width: calc(100% - 25px);"
>
<a
href="https://www.motodeks.com/harita"
>
<div
class="sow-icon-container sow-container-round"
style="color: #ffffff; "
>
<span class="sow-icon-elegantline" data-sow-icon="&#xe025;"
style="font-size: 48px; color: #000000" 
aria-hidden="true"></span>				</div>
</a>
<div class="textwidget">
<h5>
<a
href="https://www.motodeks.com/harita"
>
Aktiviteleri Kaçırma															</a>
</h5>
<p>Motosiklet etkinliklerini takip et, haritadan şehir gruplarına katıl. Tüm buluşma noktalarını keşfet!</p>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div></div></div></div></div><div id="pg-1256-3"  class="panel-grid panel-has-style" ><div class="so-parallax siteorigin-panels-stretch panel-row-style panel-row-style-for-1256-3" data-stretch-type="full-stretched" ><img decoding="async" width="2560" height="1600" src="https://www.motodeks.com/wp-content/uploads/2021/05/6789394-fantastic-street-wallpaper-2.jpg" class="attachment-full size-full" alt="6789394 fantastic street wallpaper 2" data-siteorigin-parallax="true" loading="eager" srcset="https://www.motodeks.com/wp-content/uploads/2021/05/6789394-fantastic-street-wallpaper-2.jpg 2560w, https://www.motodeks.com/wp-content/uploads/2021/05/6789394-fantastic-street-wallpaper-2-300x188.jpg 300w, https://www.motodeks.com/wp-content/uploads/2021/05/6789394-fantastic-street-wallpaper-2-1024x640.jpg 1024w, https://www.motodeks.com/wp-content/uploads/2021/05/6789394-fantastic-street-wallpaper-2-150x94.jpg 150w, https://www.motodeks.com/wp-content/uploads/2021/05/6789394-fantastic-street-wallpaper-2-768x480.jpg 768w, https://www.motodeks.com/wp-content/uploads/2021/05/6789394-fantastic-street-wallpaper-2-1536x960.jpg 1536w, https://www.motodeks.com/wp-content/uploads/2021/05/6789394-fantastic-street-wallpaper-2-2048x1280.jpg 2048w, https://www.motodeks.com/wp-content/uploads/2021/05/6789394-fantastic-street-wallpaper-2-640x400.jpg 640w, https://www.motodeks.com/wp-content/uploads/2021/05/6789394-fantastic-street-wallpaper-2-50x31.jpg 50w, https://www.motodeks.com/wp-content/uploads/2021/05/6789394-fantastic-street-wallpaper-2-100x63.jpg 100w, https://www.motodeks.com/wp-content/uploads/2021/05/6789394-fantastic-street-wallpaper-2-600x375.jpg 600w" sizes="(max-width: 2560px) 100vw, 2560px"><div id="pgc-1256-3-0"  class="panel-grid-cell" ><div id="panel-1256-3-0-0" class="so-panel widget widget_sow-headline panel-first-child panel-last-child" data-index="5" ><div
class="so-widget-sow-headline so-widget-sow-headline-default-45b8ff601695-1256"
><div class="sow-headline-container ">
<h1 class="sow-headline">
"Biz birlikte her şeyi başarabileceğimize inanıyoruz"						</h1>
</div>
</div></div></div></div></div><div id="pg-1256-4"  class="panel-grid panel-has-style" ><div class="siteorigin-panels-stretch panel-row-style panel-row-style-for-1256-4" data-stretch-type="full-stretched" ><div id="pgc-1256-4-0"  class="panel-grid-cell" ><div id="panel-1256-4-0-0" class="so-panel widget widget_sow-editor panel-first-child panel-last-child" data-index="6" ><div class="panel-widget-style panel-widget-style-for-1256-4-0-0" ><div
class="so-widget-sow-editor so-widget-sow-editor-base"
>
<div class="siteorigin-widget-tinymce textwidget">
<p class="section-title" style="text-align: left;"><style>
.mec-event-countdown-style3 .mec-event-date, .mec-wrap .mec-event-countdown-style2, .mec-wrap .mec-event-countdown-style1, .mec-event-countdown-style1 .mec-event-countdown-part3 .mec-event-button {background: #ffae00 ;}
.mec-wrap .mec-event-countdown-style1 .mec-event-countdown-part2:after { border-color: transparent transparent transparent#ffae00;}
.mec-event-countdown-style3 .mec-event-date:after {border-color: transparent transparent #ffae00 transparent;}
</style>
<div class="mec-wrap  " id="mec_skin_462">
<article class="mec-event-countdown-style3 ">
<div class="mec-event-countdown-part1">
<div class="mec-event-countdown-part-title">
<div class="mec-event-upcoming"><span>Sonraki</span> Yaklaşan Etkinlik</div>
</div>
<div class="mec-event-countdown-part-details">
<div class="mec-event-date">
<span class="mec-date1">1</span>
<span class="mec-date2">Temmuz</span>
<span class="mec-date3">2026</span>
</div>
<div class="mec-event-title-link">
<h4 class="mec-event-title">Motorlu Taşıtlar Vergisi 2.Taksit Ödeme</h4>
<a class="mec-event-link" data-event-id="3580" href="https://www.turkiye.gov.tr/gib-intvrg-motorlu-tasitlar-vergisi-sorgulama-ve-kredi-karti-ile-odeme" target="_self" rel="noopener">ETKİNLİK DETAYI</a>                </div>
<div class="mec-event-countdown" id="mec_skin_countdown462">
<ul class="clockdiv" id="countdown">
<div class="days-w block-w">
<li>
<span class="mec-days">00</span>
<p class="mec-timeRefDays label-w">günler</p>
</li>
</div>
<div class="hours-w block-w">
<li>
<span class="mec-hours">00</span>
<p class="mec-timeRefHours label-w">saatler</p>
</li>
</div>
<div class="minutes-w block-w">
<li>
<span class="mec-minutes">00</span>
<p class="mec-timeRefMinutes label-w">dakikalar</p>
</li>
</div>
<div class="seconds-w block-w">
<li>
<span class="mec-seconds">00</span>
<p class="mec-timeRefSeconds label-w">saniyeler</p>
</li>
</div>
</ul>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="mec-event-countdown-part2">
<div class="mec-event-image">
<a data-event-id="3580" href="https://www.turkiye.gov.tr/gib-intvrg-motorlu-tasitlar-vergisi-sorgulama-ve-kredi-karti-ile-odeme" target="_self" rel="noopener"><img decoding="async" width="474" height="324" src="https://www.motodeks.com/wp-content/uploads/2019/11/2022-Motosiklet-Motorlu-Taşitlar-Vergisi-ve-Elektrikli-Motosiklet-MTV-Hesaplama-Motodeks-474x324.png" class="attachment-meccarouselthumb size-meccarouselthumb wp-post-image" alt="2022 Motosiklet Motorlu Taşıtlar Vergisi ve Elektrikli Motosiklet MTV Hesaplama - Motodeks" data-mec-postid="3580" /></a>            </div>
</div>
</article>
</div></p>
